scripts.test: pnpm --filter @skilltrials/domain test && pnpm --filter @skilltrials/generation test && pnpm --filter @skilltrials/web test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @skilltrials/domain typecheck && pnpm --filter @skilltrials/generation typecheck && pnpm --filter @skilltrials/ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @skilltrials/web typecheck
